overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a desert canyon landscape on an alien planet during golden hour. The character is accompanied by a small creature and approaches tall rock spires while location text briefly appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert canyon approaching rock spires

events.description: location discovery text 'North Jundland Wastes' appears in lower left corner
large hoodoo rock formation comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through desert sand toward the distant rock spires with a blaster holstered on hip

notable_agents.action: player character with dark hair and green jacket walking forward
small dark companion creature following closely behind the character

entered.detail: three tall rock spires silhouetted against the bright sun
reddish-brown canyon cliff face on the left side
rocky canyon wall on the right side
sandy desert terrain with scattered rocks and footprints

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert canyon during golden hour, with the character walking toward distant rock spires. A location text overlay appears briefly. The small companion creature follows closely as they traverse the sandy terrain between canyon walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon passing large hoodoo formation

events.description: character glances upward at the large hoodoo formation while continuing to walk
passing the large hoodoo formation, view opens back up to the central spires

agents.ego_description: walking past a massive mushroom-shaped hoodoo rock formation while looking up at it

notable_agents.action: character walking steadily with hand near blaster holster
companion creature trotting alongside on the sandy terrain

entered.detail: tall mushroom-shaped red rock formation with layered structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a prominent hoodoo rock formation on the right, with the camera panning to show its scale. The central spires grow larger in the distance as the character continues through the canyon, and the companion creature keeps pace alongside.

events.description: companion creature runs ahead more actively toward the spires

agents.ego_description: approaching the central spires with steady pace, the companion creature running ahead

notable_agents.action: character walking toward the towering rock spires with sun flaring behind them
companion creature running actively ahead and alongside the character

segments.scene_description: Having passed the hoodoo formation, the character continues across open desert toward the central spires which now dominate the view. The companion creature runs energetically alongside as they approach the massive rock formations silhouetted against the bright sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide desert canyon that gradually closes in on towering rock spires during the golden hour. It begins with the character and a small companion creature traversing sandy terrain between canyon walls, while a location text overlay briefly appears on screen. As they move forward, the camera pans to reveal the scale of a prominent hoodoo rock formation on the right before shifting focus back to the central spires growing larger in the distance. The scene then expands across the open desert as the companion creature runs energetically alongside the character. Finally, the camera approaches the massive rock formations, which now dominate the view and stand silhouetted against the bright sun.
